summary: First pass full-stack test of SpinnShot (backend FastAPI + companion web). All 11 backend pytest tests pass against the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL, and the React companion renders correctly, integrates with the API end-to-end (POST → reload → leaderboard + history populate → DELETE), and is responsive on tablet/mobile. Android Kotlin under /app/app was skipped per instructions.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses Python module-level os.environ['MONGO_URL'] / os.environ['DB_NAME'] -- fast-fails if env missing, which is correct.
/api/games response model is `dict` but only returns {id, uid}. Consider a typed Pydantic response (e.g. GameCreateOut) for OpenAPI clarity.

/api/leaderboard does not include shots in its sort tiebreaker. Documented rules say shots-tiebreak — currently sorts by wins desc, points desc only. If shots-tiebreak matters globally, add a third {shots: 1} sort key.
Question CSV is reloaded from disk on every /api/questions and /api/categories call. For a 50-row file this is fine but consider an in-memory cache (one-time load at startup).

/api/games leaks Mongo _id as a string (good) but stores `uid` only in the doc — frontend cannot disambiguate idempotent retries from the Android client. Consider returning 409 if a duplicate uid is posted, or making uid a unique index.
Frontend App.js (288 lines) is fine for now but tightly couples sections; if more screens get added, split Header/Hero/About/Modes/Leaderboard/History/Build into /components.
Frontend has no loading/error UI for the initial Promise.all — on API failure the page silently stays at empty state ('Aún no hay partidas...'). Add a visible error banner.
axios is used only for 3 GETs. Could be replaced by native fetch to drop a dependency.
data-testid coverage is excellent across the requested sections.
test_credentials: N/A - no auth in this app. /app/memory/test_credentials.md was not consulted (no auth flow).
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed data created. Tests insert 2 games (TEST_Ana / TEST_Luis / TEST_Sofi) and clean them up in the final test. Browser-side end-to-end test inserted 1 game (UI_Ana / UI_Luis) and deleted it. DB should be clean.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend reachable at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL/api. Categories file has 9 entries: Biología, Cine, Cultura Colombiana, Cómics, Deportes, Geografía, Historia, Series, Videojuegos. questions.csv has 55 rows (header + 55 questions). DELETE returns 400 for malformed ObjectId, 404 for non-existent valid ObjectId. /api/games returns played_at as ISO string. Leaderboard aggregation correctly sums wins/points/shots per player name across games (verified with 2 games / 3 players).
verified_endpoints: GET /api/leaderboard -> aggregated wins/points/shots across games (math verified)
verified_frontend_flows: All requested data-testids present: hero, phone-mock, nav-about/modes/leaderboard/history/build, mode-shot_o_reto/verdad_o_reto/verdad_o_shot, lb-table, history, build, footer, stat-strip
Initial empty state shows empty-leaderboard + empty-history messages
After POST /api/games and reload, lb-table renders with row 'UI_Ana 1 1 5 1' (wins=1, games=1, points=5, shots=1), history card appears with played_at, stat strip updates to '2 players / 1 game'
Hero stacks at <=880px (grid-template-columns becomes single column 840px); mobile (390px) renders cleanly
No console errors observed during full flow
